description: CompositionWhite collared t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with pink and black stripes, appliqued logo on left chest and split hemFittingRegularWash care Pre-soak the garment before wash Wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened Preferably hand washed Use only mild detergents Wash dark colours separately Do not attempt to remove stains by spot washing Drip dry on hanger and avoid wringing Flat dry Preferably steam iron Look stylish in this striped polo neck t-shirt from scullers. The discreet pink with bold black stripes on the white base gives it a fresh look, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The split hem ensures a perfect Fit, allowing you to either tuck the shirt for a semi-formal look, or wear it out on casual days. Pair this tee with denims or chinos and floaters for casual dressing.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2', Shoulders-17.5"
